Non-binding Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Mariscope Water Pty Ltd by Ridgetide Energy Ltd (ACN 443 889 112; ABN 44 388 911 200; ASX code: RTD?).
Structure: share sale or asset sale; final mechanics to be documented; parties acknowledge standard confidentiality and costs provisions.
Consideration: mix of cash and scrip; price range TBD; any share issue to comply with ASX Listing Rule 7.1 and subject to shareholder approval.
Funding: internal cash and existing undrawn facility with Riverbank Mutual Credit Co‑Operative Ltd; no new financing announced.
Conditions: FIRB no objection and ACCC informal clearance; third‑party consents; if implemented by scheme, court approvals and ASIC registration.
ASX disclosure: announcement scheduled for 28 Aug 2025 under Listing Rule 3.1; draft release prepared but not yet lodged with ASX.
Blackout: issuer employees are restricted from trading in company securities from Board resolution until the ASX announcement; internal compliance notice issued.
ASX forms: any new issue will require Appendix 3B and s708A cleansing notice; Appendix 4E lodged on 29 Aug 2024 and remains publicly available.
Due diligence: confirmatory review limited to aggregated operational data; no access to identifiable employee records or health information.
Exclusivity: 45 business days with fiduciary carve‑outs; break fee TBD and to be consistent with Takeovers Panel guidance.
References: ASX announcement dated 03 Feb 2023 regarding strategic review; ASIC lodgement of amended constitution on 15 Nov 2022; both already announced.
Communications: no selective briefings; any investor update to be via ASX platform and public website; trading halt may be requested under LR 17.1 if necessary.
Employees: no immediate changes to terms; transfer of business provisions under the Fair Work Act 2009 may be considered post‑completion.
Identifiers: ISIN AU00RTD000 is a placeholder only and not official; final codes to be confirmed upon issuance (if any).
Investor relations contact: ir@ridgetideenergy.com.au; general enquiries via the public helpline listed on the corporate site.
